title: Design System: Kinetic Trust / Neon Glass

display.purpose: Hero headings only — one per page or campaign hero. Never repeated within a section.

headline.purpose: Section headings and primary card titles on large/tall cards. text-wrap: balance required.

title.purpose: Card headings on medium/small cards, modal titles, secondary section headings.

body.purpose: All prose content. Maximum line length 65ch. Adobe Clean exclusively.

label.purpose: Eyebrow labels, stat captions, data annotations, button text. JetBrains Mono only.

badge.purpose: Status pills and eyebrow badge text. JetBrains Mono 500, 10px, 0.1em letter-spacing, uppercase. Pill shape (border-radius: 9999px) only.

icon.purpose: Material Symbols Outlined. Variation settings: 'FILL' 0, 'wght' 300, 'GRAD' 0, 'opsz' 24. Default 20px; 28px in feature-list card variant.

shadows.name: cyan-aura
shadows.purpose: Hover state only on interactive glass cards and primary buttons. Communicates that the element is a live control surface. Never applied at rest.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default easing for state transitions — border-color, background, box-shadow.

motion.name: duration-medium
motion.purpose: Card hover border and glow transitions.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Primary CTA. Phosphor Cyan fill, Obsidian text, 8px radius. The sharpest typographic element in the system.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; background: #00dbe9; color: #0a0c10; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.05em; text-transform: uppercase; text-decoration: none; padding: 10px 24px; border-radius: 8px; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s ease, box-shadow 0.3s ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #00f0ff; box-shadow: 0 0 24px -4px rgba(0, 219, 233, 0.3); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #00dbe9; outline-offset: 3px; } @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .ds-btn-primary { transition: none; } }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary CTA. Transparent background, cyan text and border.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; background: transparent; color: #00dbe9; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.05em; text-transform: uppercase; text-decoration: none; padding: 10px 24px; border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); cursor: pointer; transition: border-color 0.3s ease, color 0.2s ease; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { border-color: rgba(0,219,233,0.4); color: #00f0ff; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #00dbe9; outline-offset: 3px; } @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .ds-btn-ghost { transition: none; } }

components.name: Glass Card
components.description: Primary layout container. Glassmorphism on Surface (#111318). Never on Obsidian — tonal contrast makes the glass effect register.
components.html:
UNLIMITED 5%

Cash Back

Every spend is an investment. Get 5% unlimited cash back on all tech and data services.
components.css: .ds-glass-card { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.03); backdrop-filter: blur(12px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(12px); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); border-radius: 24px; padding: 32px; transition: border-color 0.3s ease, box-shadow 0.3s ease; } .ds-glass-card:hover { border-color: rgba(0,219,233,0.35); box-shadow: 0 0 24px -4px rgba(0,219,233,0.3); } .ds-card-eyebrow { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; margin-bottom: 16px; } .ds-eyebrow-text { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #00dbe9; background: rgba(0,219,233,0.08); border: 1px solid rgba(0,219,233,0.15); border-radius: 9999px; padding: 4px 14px; } .ds-card-title { font-family: 'Hanken Grotesk', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 800; letter-spacing: -0.02em; color: #e2e2e8; margin: 0 0 16px; max-width: 26ch; } .ds-card-body { font-family: 'adobe-clean', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1.125rem; line-height: 1.6; color: #b9cacb; max-width: 40ch; margin: 0; } @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .ds-glass-card { transition: none; } }

components.name: Eyebrow Pill
components.description: Category identifier for cards and sections. JetBrains Mono, uppercase, cyan. Full pill radius. Rendered from authored eyebrow cell text in offer-grid.
components.css: .ds-eyebrow { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; color: #00dbe9; margin-bottom: 16px; } .ds-eyebrow-icon { font-family: 'Material Symbols Outlined'; font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 0, 'wght' 400, 'GRAD' 0, 'opsz' 24; font-size: 28px; line-height: 1; } .ds-eyebrow-label { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; }

components.name: Stat Data Point
components.description: Rate and metric display inside offer cards. Institutional vocabulary: label above value.
components.css: .ds-stat { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; } .ds-stat-label { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.6875rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #b9cacb; } .ds-stat-value { font-family: 'Hanken Grotesk', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1.75rem; font-weight: 900; line-height: 1; color: #00dbe9; }

components.name: CTA Section (Prominent Centered)
components.description: Full-width conversion surface. Eyebrow badges precede the heading in authored content for pill rendering. 'centered' modifier auto-widths the button.
components.html:
⊙ INSTANT APPROVAL⊙ SECURE KYC⊙ UK/EU SUPPORT

The best rate
is waiting

Join the future of finance. SecurBank institutional-grade cards are tailored for those who demand more from their capital.

Apply Now →
components.css: .ds-cta-prominent { text-align: center; padding: 80px 32px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.03); backdrop-filter: blur(12px); border-radius: 24px; } .ds-cta-badges { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; justify-content: center; gap: 12px; margin-bottom: 32px; } .ds-cta-badge { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #00dbe9; background: rgba(0,219,233,0.08); border: 1px solid rgba(0,219,233,0.15); border-radius: 9999px; padding: 4px 14px; } .ds-cta-heading { font-family: 'Hanken Grotesk', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: clamp(2.5rem, 6vw, 5.5rem); font-weight: 900; letter-spacing: -0.02em; line-height: 1; color: #e2e2e8; margin: 0 0 24px; text-wrap: balance; } .ds-cta-heading em { color: #00dbe9; font-style: normal; } .ds-cta-body { font-family: 'adobe-clean', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1.125rem; line-height: 1.6; color: #b9cacb; max-width: 50ch; margin: 0 auto 32px; }

narrative.overview:
The Kinetic Trust design system is a vault — not a bank branch. The obsidian surface is the vault door: absolute, impenetrable, radiating gravity. The primary cyan is the signal that something is alive inside: phosphor light cutting through total darkness, carrying live data and actionable intelligence. Glass panels don't decorate — they reveal depth without breaching the vault's integrity. Every component is a control surface, not a display case.

This system explicitly rejects the serifed restraint of traditional private banking (Coutts, J.P. Morgan Private Bank), which reads as slow and exclusionary. It rejects the grey-grid density of Bloomberg terminals — functional but not aspirational, institutional without intention. It rejects the candy-bright roundedness of neobank/fintech-lite products (Monzo, Revolut) — too retail, too thin, zero institutional gravity.

The design is a complete register: the Neon Glass vocabulary must remain coherent from the logged-out marketing site through to the authenticated dashboard. A visitor moving from the credit-cards page to their portfolio view must feel the same vault.
keyCharacteristics: Obsidian depth, never flat: three distinct background layers create visual gravity without pattern or illustration
One signal, maximum rarity: primary cyan appears on ≤10% of any screen surface
Glass as structure: glassmorphism is the layout primitive — never decorative
Hanken Grotesk at 900 weight: display text is the brand's loudest assertion
JetBrains Mono for all numeric and machine-generated strings: data is institutionally precise

rules.name: The One Signal Rule
rules.body: Primary cyan (#00dbe9) covers ≤10% of any given screen surface. If more than one in ten visual units is cyan, the signal is diluted. Rarity is the product.

rules.name: The Vault First Rule
rules.body: Glass cards must be placed on a Surface (#111318) or Surface Lowest (#0c0e12) background to register visually. A glass card on Obsidian is invisible — this is a rendering requirement.

rules.name: The Data Mono Rule
rules.body: JetBrains Mono is reserved for three uses only: numeric values, machine-generated strings, and eyebrow labels. Every other typographic role belongs to Hanken Grotesk or Adobe Clean.

rules.name: The Weight Rule
rules.body: h1–h2 in editorial contexts: 900. h2–h3 in card contexts: 800. h3–h4 in list/table contexts: 700. Body always 400. Never use 600 for headings.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: All surfaces are flat and shadow-free at rest. The only elevation signal is the tonal stack. Shadows appear exclusively as hover-state interactivity signals, never as decoration.

dos: Do place glass cards on a Surface (#111318) background, never directly on Obsidian (#0a0c10)
Do use JetBrains Mono exclusively for numeric values, machine-generated strings, and eyebrow labels
Do use border-radius: 8px on buttons and border-radius: 24px on cards — the system's complete shape vocabulary
Do apply the Cyan Aura (box-shadow: 0 0 24px -4px rgba(0,219,233,0.3)) only on interactive hover states
Do use Hanken Grotesk at 900 weight for display headings
Do include @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) alternatives for all transitions
Do use the four-col modifier class on offer-grid when rendering exactly 4 small cards in a row
Do reorder authored content so eyebrow badge paragraphs precede the heading in CTA blocks — the JS gates pill rendering on content order
donts: Don't build the traditional private banking aesthetic: no serif display fonts, no dark-wood warmth, no old-money discretion
Don't use the Bloomberg/Reuters terminal register: no grey-grid density, no monochrome layouts
Don't build neobank/fintech-lite components: no candy-bright pastels, no rounded-everything cards
Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored accent stripe on cards
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text with a gradient)
Don't add glassmorphism decoratively — any blur layer that doesn't carry informational weight is noise
Don't apply eyebrow pills above every section — one named kicker is voice; eyebrows everywhere is AI grammar
Don't place identical-sized cards in a repeating grid — use the bento system's size variants
Don't use the hero-metric template (big number, small label, gradient orb)
